description_long: This object is a digital single-lens reflex (DSLR) camera with a detachable lens and a large external flash unit mounted on top. The camera body is predominantly black with a textured grip on the right side and a prominent shutter button. The lens is circular, protruding from the front, and features visible ridges for manual adjustment. The external flash is boxy, with a translucent front panel and control buttons on its rear, attached via a hot shoe mount. The camera's rear side includes a viewfinder, control dials, and a display area, while the left side shows additional buttons and ports. The overall design is robust and ergonomic, suitable for handheld use in urban photography scenarios.
description: A black DSLR camera with a detachable lens and a large external flash mounted on top, featuring a textured grip and multiple control dials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lens, flash unit, and textured grip with visible control dials.
description_view_1: Top view highlighting the flash unit's rear controls and the camera's hot shoe mount.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the viewfinder, control dials, and the back of the camera body.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the camera's grip, lens, and part of the flash mount.
